weather_line: Fog in the hollows · secondary channel running · briefcase whereabouts: unknown

stories.headline: Briefcase Traced to Diagon Alley; the Man in the Suit Has Not Been Seen Since Thursday, Which Is Odd Because It Is Sunday
body: The glowing briefcase logged as 'Unattended (Luminous)' at eleven-oh-three Friday evening — collected from Ministry security by a short, unnamed man in a suit described by four witnesses as 'extremely motivated' and by a fifth as 'a person who knew exactly where he was going and was not going to discuss it' — has been located. It is in Diagon Alley. It is in the back room of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, which raises more questions than it answers.

The Ministry's Office of Unusual Emanations dispatched two junior investigators to the premises this morning. Both returned. Neither would say what they saw. One has requested a desk transfer. The briefcase itself has not been opened, has not stopped glowing, and has been placed, according to a source inside the Wheezes back room, 'somewhere we felt was appropriate,' which the Ministry is currently interpreting as either reassuring or ominous depending on seniority.

The man in the suit remains unaccounted for. The Ministry's Saturday bulletin, which mentioned the briefcase once, has not been corrected, amended, or retracted. Officials describe the situation as 'developing.' The briefcase, by all available reports, continues to glow.

stories.headline: Sunday Identified as a Day of Rest; Household Convenes to Discuss Definition; Meeting Adjourned Without Consensus
body: The proposition that Sunday constitutes a day of rest was introduced at approximately nine fifteen this morning and received with what observers characterised as 'general interest and specific scepticism.' Steve noted that the enchanted Jeep had been making a sound since the southwest ford that deserved consideration. Christine observed that the Hempworth November margins contained a footnote she had not yet fully cross-referenced. Both statements were delivered calmly and without any suggestion that rest was not, in principle, an excellent idea.

By eleven o'clock the Jeep had been looked at briefly and the footnote had been located. Whether either of these activities constitutes rest is a question the household declined to formally resolve. The brass ducks on the shelf face southwest. The chart table has space. The coffee, a witness confirmed, was excellent.

stories.headline: Southwest Quadrant: A Second Look, in Daylight, Confirms the First Look Was Correct; Hempworth Is Vindicated; Steve Adds Half a Point
body: A Sunday survey of Saturday's notes — conducted by Christine at the kitchen table with the chart weighted at two corners by the brass ducks and a mug — has confirmed that the southwest quadrant visit was accurately recorded, the secondary channel was forded at the implied depth, and the sandstone shelf was, in the light of Saturday morning, exactly as described by the chart and nothing other than that. Hempworth's conditional notation, once the condition was met, proved sufficient. This is not a surprise. It is nonetheless satisfying to confirm.

Steve, reviewing the same notes separately and arriving at the same conclusion by a different route, has raised his assessment of Saturday to ten. He has not announced this figure but has written it in pencil in the margin of the chart, where Christine will find it and where it will mean what it means. The Jeep makes its sound. The sound, Steve maintains, is not urgent.

stories.headline: Andrew Files Sunday Dispatch; Is Well; Notes That the Southwest Quadrant Resolution Is Exactly What He Expected From the Available Evidence
body: A brief dispatch arrived this morning from the Prophet's correspondent abroad. Andrew confirms he is well. He has been following the southwest quadrant situation and notes, with the particular satisfaction of someone who has been watching from a considerable distance, that the July water table was never in doubt and that Christine's reading of the chart ink was the correct methodology. He does not say he told anyone this. He does not need to.

The dispatch closes with one question about the brass ducks' current southwest-facing position that suggests he has been paying more attention to the shelf updates than previously disclosed. He is well.

familiars_corner: Lucy: An audit of the biscuit inventory conducted this morning revealed a discrepancy of two. Lucy submitted a written statement attributing this to 'natural variance' and has retained it as her official position. The audit found no evidence. There is never any evidence.

Ellie: Ellie spent a portion of Sunday morning making friends with the back garden window, which she has not previously encountered from this angle. The encounter was positive. She has greeted it twice since. The window has not confirmed the friendship but has not denied it.

Jersey: Jersey assessed all available laps this morning, selected the best one by criteria he has not disclosed, and has not moved since. He considers this a Sunday well spent and has no further comment.
founding_editor_note: That sound the Jeep is making is the left-side bracket. I know the sound. Tighten the left-side bracket. You're welcome. — D.

in_brief.sport: The Gringotts Vault-Carry Invitational remains unscheduled; the defending champion has returned to her desk and the goblins are pretending they were never curious about her numbers.
in_brief.forecast: Fog in the hollows through midmorning, clearing to a fine July afternoon; secondary channel holding; the briefcase is still glowing and the forecast office declines to speculate about that specifically.

storyline_updates.title: The Briefcase Returns
storyline_updates.summary: Day 2: The briefcase has been traced to the back room of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes in Diagon Alley. Two Ministry investigators visited, returned, and declined to report. The man in the suit remains unaccounted for. The briefcase continues to glow and has not been opened. It has been placed somewhere described as 'appropriate.' The Ministry considers the situation developing. Day 3 should bring either the man in the suit back into the picture, an attempt to open the briefcase, or an unexpected Gringotts connection — the goblins have an opinion about luminous unattended items and it is possible Christine will be consulted.
